name: Edge Agent with a credential should provide proof to Cloud Agent
fullName: features/provide_proof.feature#Edge Agent with a credential should provide proof to Cloud Agent
description: The Edge Agent should provide proof to Cloud Agent
descriptionHtml: The Edge Agent should provide proof to Cloud Agent

testStage.description: The Edge Agent should provide proof to Cloud Agent

steps.name: Given Cloud Agent is connected to Edge Agent
And Edge Agent has '1' jwt credentials issued by Cloud Agent
When Cloud Agent asks for present-proof
And Edge Agent sends the present-proof
Then Cloud Agent should see the present-proof is verified
